name: messages
description: Read recent inbound iMessage / SMS conversations from the user's Mac, or send a message via Messages.app.
when_to_use: User asks who recently messaged them, what someone said, or asks you to send a text / iMessage to a contact (by phone, email, or handle).
when_not_to_use: User wants email — use the email skill. For an at-a-glance digest, the messages.md context report is usually enough; only call this skill for fresh detail or to take action.

limit.description: For mode=recent: how many recent inbound messages to return (default 20, max 100).

to.description: For mode=send: recipient handle (phone number with country code, iMessage email, or Apple ID).

messages.description: For recent: list of {sender, text, received_at, chat}.
